creator: rfarmer@predatorlabs.net
text:
I'm not sure CONFLICTS is necessary. I have the old version installed
(with dklibs), used your patch (without the CONFLICTS line), and ran
portmaster to upgrade. It ran fine. I then pkg_delete'd dklibs and it
still worked.

If there's a problem I didn't run across, then I think a note in
UPDATING is necessary, saying to delete dklibs first. Otherwise
portmaster/portupgrade won't work normally.

Otherwise, approved, including deprecating dklibs.

-- 
Rob Farmer
